content: Hi, I'm Ada. This is my personal blog where I write about computer things and others personal things.

title: About

content:
Welcome to the blog. This is a sample post so you can see how everything renders before writing your own. Delete it (or edit it) whenever you're ready.
Why this blog exists I wanted a quiet place to publish notes, walkthroughs, and small projects. A static site keeps it fast, free, and easy to maintain.
A quick Org tour You can write bold, italic, and inline code. Links work too: the Hugo docs.
Blockquotes are handy for callouts and quotes from other sources.
Lists Unordered item one Unordered item two
A nested item Unordered item three Ordered item one Ordered item two Ordered item three Code blocks def greet(name: str) -> str: return f"Hello, {name}!" if __name__ == "__main__": print(greet("world")) # Build the site locally hugo server -D A task list Set up Hugo with the PaperMod theme Configure the site Write my first real post What's next Edit this file at content/posts/hello-world.org, or create a new post with:
hugo new posts/my-first-real-post.org That's it for now. Thanks for reading.
summary: A short first post to kick things off and show what Org looks like in this blog.
title: Hello World

content: English: Hello World Français: Bonjour le monde Español: Hola Mundo Português: Olá Mundo
summary: Hello, world — in English, French, Spanish, and Portuguese.
title: Olá Mundo

title: Hello World

content:
Olá Mundo, Hola Mundo, Hello World, Bonjour le monde
Boas pessoal prazer, sou Ada e estou começando aqui meu blog, o qual tenho o propósito de escrever sobre cybersegurança, computadores e meus hobbies; Sou uma cientista da computação que no momento está fazendo mestrado e eventualmente esbarro com algumas coisas que acharia legal de escrever, então vamos lá!
title: Olá Mundo
